# AXError.h

**API Collection**

These error codes can be returned from the accessibility functions defined in AXUIElement.h.

## Overview

### Included Headers

- <CoreFoundation/CoreFoundation.h>

## Constants

- **AXError**: Error codes returned by accessibility functions.
